name: besu-load-injector
description: Besu 네트워크 컨트랙트 콜 부하 유입 API Gateway

scripts.dev: npm run build && npx pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env development
scripts.start: npm run build && npx pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
scripts.reload: npm run build && npx pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js --update-env
scripts.stop: npx pm2 stop besu-loader && npx pm2 delete besu-loader
